skills.name: Stab
skills.effect: Thrusting attack; always applies Bleeding.

skills.name: Cut
skills.effect: Slashing attack; 30% Trauma chance.

skills.name: Double Hit
skills.effect: Two hits on same target. Second hit at half damage. Each hit rolls Bleed and Trauma independently.

skills.name: Perfect Double Cut
skills.effect: Two full hits. Both apply Bleeding. 30% Trauma each.

skills.name: Speed Break
skills.effect: Attack that reduces target SPD by 2 tiers

skills.name: Dismember
skills.effect: Cleaving attack; 20% instant kill vs humanoids

skills.name: Execution
skills.effect: Instantly kills any enemy regardless of type.

skills.name: Head Bash
skills.effect: Crushing blow that may stun the target

skills.name: Limb Strike
skills.effect: Targets limbs, applying pain (slow)

skills.name: Double Hit
skills.effect: Two hits on same target. Second hit at half damage.

skills.name: Smash
skills.effect: Normal damage. Applies Stunned AND Trauma simultaneously.

name: Bow

skills.name: Normal Attack
skills.effect: Ranged strike dealing STR−DEF damage; 20% slow, 10% pain chance.

skills.name: Double Shot
skills.effect: Two ranged strikes at half damage each, no status.

skills.name: Fatal Shot
skills.effect: 50% chance of double damage; on fail deals 1-2 raw damage.

skills.name: Piercing Shot
skills.effect: Normal damage +1-2 extra vs armored (DEF>0) enemies.

skills.name: Poison Shot
skills.effect: Normal damage and applies Poison status.

skills.name: Fire Shot
skills.effect: Normal damage and applies Burn status.

passiveEffect: Each shot reduces your SPD by 1 this battle.

skills.name: Arcane Bolt
skills.effect: Magic bolt dealing INT−MDEF; auto-triggers on attack

skills.name: Elemental Shot
skills.effect: Elemental projectile dealing INT−MDEF; auto-triggers

skills.name: Stab
skills.effect: Thrusting attack; always applies Bleeding.

skills.name: Cut
skills.effect: Slashing attack; 30% Trauma chance.

skills.name: Cleave
skills.effect: Wide swing hitting all enemies for STR−DEF

skills.name: Heavy Strike
skills.effect: Powerful blow; +4 bonus damage

skills.name: Large Hit
skills.effect: Normal damage to target + half damage to one random other enemy.

name: Hammer

skills.name: Destroy Armor
skills.effect: Hit + shatters armor; every subsequent hit deals +2-3 extra damage.

skills.name: Break
skills.effect: Hit + breaks momentum; target always acts last this battle.

skills.name: Disarm
skills.effect: Hit + disarms target; target deals half damage for the battle.

passiveEffect: 30% chance to apply Pain on normal attack.

skills.name: Cut
skills.effect: Slashing attack; 30% Trauma chance (reduces STR or DEX).

skills.name: Dismember
skills.effect: Cleaving attack; 20% instant kill vs humanoids.

skills.name: Death Dance
skills.effect: 3 rapid hits on a single target. Each calculated separately.
